text:
It was a beautiful spring morning. Birds were singing. Leaves were glowing like fall jewels. I was walking through my favorite park. There was a small garden where they liked to feed the flamingos. That's where I met old Mr. Finch.

Mr. Finch was a wonderful old gent. He sat there forever. Just talking to himself or maybe the birds. Today he was telling stories about flying bees. I asked if there really were such things. He just winked. We wandered a bit. I always wanted to walk like a clock. We sat by the pond. Just listened. The water was calm. That's like silence.

I liked silence. But I didn'd think I ever wanted silence like that. I just liked thinking. There I was. Just a big old silly bird. Thinking about big things. You know like love. That feels like silence. Wow. So much to think. Just like the pond.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
